name: S & R Sales & Pawn Shop
description_short: S & R Sales & Pawn Shop is a pawn and thrift store located in Mesquite, TX, offering collateral-based loans and merchandise sales.
description_long: S & R Sales & Pawn Shop operates as a pawn shop and thrift store hybrid in Mesquite, Texas, serving the local community's short-term lending and secondhand retail needs. The business is positioned in the collateral-based lending market, where customers can pledge personal items for immediate cash. While the Opendi listing categorizes the business primarily under thrift stores, the company name and pawn shop designation indicate a dual-purpose operation combining both lending and retail merchandise sales. The business has been listed in local directories and maintains an active phone line for customer inquiries. However, limited detailed information is publicly available through their business listing, which suggests either a lean digital presence or recent establishment. The company operates at a straightforward location on Lake June Road, making it accessible to Mesquite residents seeking quick cash solutions or secondhand goods. Like many independent pawn shops, S & R likely serves customers who need immediate liquidity or prefer collateral-based lending over traditional bank loans. The thrift store component may appeal to bargain hunters and those seeking affordable used merchandise. The lack of online reviews or extensive web presence means potential customers have limited third-party validation of service quality. The business model itself—combining pawn services with thrift retail—is common in the industry but depends heavily on local reputation and foot traffic for success.
pros: Local Mesquite location accessible to residents on Lake June Road
Dual business model offering both pawn loans and thrift store merchandise
Established landline contact (972) 289-6677 for customer inquiries
Likely offers fast cash access through collateral-based lending
Listed in multiple local business directories for visibility
cons: No online reviews available to assess service quality or customer satisfaction
Minimal web presence or detailed business information publicly available
No website of their own—only exists on third-party business directories
Limited information about loan terms, interest rates, or pawn policies
Unclear operational hours or specific services offered beyond basic listing
best_for: Mesquite residents needing quick cash against personal collateral
Bargain shoppers looking for affordable secondhand merchandise
Customers who prefer local, in-person transactions over online lenders
diagnosis: S & R Sales & Pawn Shop is best for Mesquite residents needing immediate cash through collateral-based lending or those seeking affordable secondhand merchandise. The main caveat is the near-complete absence of online transparency regarding loan terms, rates, policies, and customer feedback, making it difficult to assess service quality before visiting in person.
